task1.title: Internet usage across age groups
task1.question:
The graph below shows the percentage of people in different age groups who used the internet daily in a European country between 2005 and 2020.

Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.

Write at least 150 words.

task1.title: Average monthly expenditure by category
task1.question:
The bar chart below shows the average monthly expenditure on five categories of goods and services by households in four countries in 2019.

Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.

Write at least 150 words.

task1.title: Energy sources in two countries
task1.question:
The pie charts below show the proportion of energy generated from different sources in Country A and Country B in 2022.

Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.

Write at least 150 words.

task1.title: Town centre redevelopment plan
task1.question:
The maps below show the layout of a town centre in 1990 and the present day.

Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.

Write at least 150 words.

task1.title: How glass bottles are recycled
task1.question:
The diagram below illustrates the process by which glass bottles are collected and recycled.

Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.

Write at least 150 words.

task2.title: Technology replacing human workers
task2.question:
Some people believe that technology will eventually replace human workers in most industries. Others think that humans will always be needed in the workforce.

Discuss both views and give your own opinion.

Give reasons for your answer and include any relevant examples from your own knowledge or experience.

Write at least 250 words.

task2.title: Living in cities vs rural areas
task2.question:
More and more people are choosing to live in cities rather than in rural areas. What are the advantages and disadvantages of city life?

Give reasons for your answer and include any relevant examples from your own knowledge or experience.

Write at least 250 words.

task2.title: Increasing levels of obesity
task2.question:
In many countries, the proportion of older people is steadily increasing. What problems will this cause for individuals and society? Suggest some measures that could be taken to address these problems.

Give reasons for your answer and include any relevant examples from your own knowledge or experience.

Write at least 250 words.

task2.title: International travel and cultural understanding
task2.question:
Some people say that international travel has made people more similar and has reduced cultural differences. Do you agree or disagree?

Give reasons for your answer and include any relevant examples from your own knowledge or experience.

Write at least 250 words.

task2.title: Children using smartphones
task2.question:
In many countries, children are given smartphones at a very young age. What are the advantages and disadvantages of this trend? Do you think the benefits outweigh the drawbacks?

Give reasons for your answer and include any relevant examples from your own knowledge or experience.

Write at least 250 words.
